source_pr.title: *: fix ManagedLockTTL race in test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Shuaipeng Yu <jackysp@gmail.com>

<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix data race found in CI.

### What is changed and how it works?
Use atomic.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

symptoms: PR body: Fix data race found in CI (ManagedLockTTL in test)
failure_signature: PR body: Fix data race found in CI (ManagedLockTTL in test)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: fix ManagedLockTTL race in test.

evidence: evidence: PR body: Fix data race found in CI (ManagedLockTTL in test)
